task_completion.description: Access the patient record for Arthur Jensen
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface should display the patient profile or visit record for 'Arthur Jensen' (ID: P00014).
The Vitals section of the visit or patient record should show the recorded values: BP 132/78, HR 82, RR 20, Temp 37.0, O2 92%, Weight 74, Height 178.

task_completion.description: Add a discharge diagnosis for the respiratory condition
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Diagnosis section should display a respiratory condition such as 'COPD', 'chronic obstructive pulmonary', 'emphysema', or 'bronchitis'.

task_completion.description: Add a medication order for the respiratory condition
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Medication section should display a respiratory medication such as 'albuterol', 'inhaler', 'symbicort', 'salbutamol', 'fluticasone', etc.
The Visit Status or Discharge Status should be marked as 'Discharged', 'Completed', 'Checkout', or 'Checked out'.
